name: Highwood Oil Company Ltd.
summary: Highwood Oil Company Ltd., together with its subsidiary, engages in the acquisition, exploration, development, and production of oil and gas reserves in the Western Canadian Sedimentary basin. It holds 100% interest in the Wabsaca River pipeline system, a 210 km crude oil sales line with a capacity to deliver 20,000 barrel per day of crude to the Plains Rainbow Pipeline in Northern Alberta. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Calgary, Canada.
